items.name_en: LOв„®wв„®рџЊџMini Soft Suede Amazona 180 Handbag. Reinterpreting the House's iconic bag with a casual silhouette and a single top handle. The bag features an open design with a hidden snap closure for the main compartment. Equipped with a detachable shoulder strap and crossbody strap for a practical look. This mini version is made of suede and calfskin.*Two carrying modes*Short top handle, detachable shoulder strap and crossbody strap*Zipper with two leather pulls*Two compartments, main compartment with magnetic snap closure*Left D-ring is customizable*Suede lining with LOE*WE hot-stamped or silver-hot-stamped, Double L embossed logoрџЊџ

items.name_en: LOв„®wв„®рџЊџNew Arrival Denim Amazona 23 Cropped Handbag *Bowling Bag рџЋі Latest Sizeрџ†•
items.name_cn:
LOв„®wв„®рџЊџNew Arrival Denim Amazona 23 Cropped Handbag *Bowling Bag рџЋі Latest Sizeрџ†•
Born in the 1970s, the Amazona handbag is reimagined in a long baguette proportion, continuing the iconic Amazona logo. This version is made of denim, fully decorated with a kitten pattern. Louis Wain's Futurrist Cats ceramic vase series.*Equipped with a small padlock as a new icon рџ”’to match the modern lifestyle where devices are often stored in the bag*And the design is updated with double zippers for easy opening and closing*Tubular leather handle and vintage bag corner details*Can be crossbody, on the shoulder, or handheld *The compact shape exudes a playful academic style.
Model: 062417
Size: 23*10*11CM

items.name_en: LOв„®wв„®рџЊџNew Arrival рџ†• New Season Artist Collaboration Series Handbag. Collaborating with Japanese bamboo artist Hafu Matsumoto to present 4 bag styles. The new work uses flexible calfskin to simulate the natural form of bamboo, shaping a three-dimensional silhouette through weaving and knotting techniques. The Zen-inspired design features a Japanese wabi-sabi aesthetic.
